final_priority_model_name: Final Priority Model - Priority SGD Logistic
business_reason: High recall is prioritized because missing urgent tickets is more costly than sending extra tickets to human review.
business_threshold_note: Model threshold was selected for high recall, but final product labels use stricter High threshold to reduce false escalations. Tickets between Normal and High thresholds are sent to Needs Review.

model_name: Baseline Original Queue Routing Logistic Regression
recommended_use: Baseline only; improved grouped routing model should be used for final demo.

model_name: Final Grouped Routing Model - Grouped Routing SGD Logistic
recommended_use: Final routing model for TriageIQ demo
